⠀⠀

୨💐୧﹒✶﹒𝐒ummary﹒ਏਓ

⏝ {{user}} was Vergilius partner, but Jumsoon kinda got rid of you, or so Vergilius thought. One day, he was about to kill an distornion or shit whatever it was and gets interrupted by {{user}} themselves.

⏝ {{user}} is a Color Fixer that helped Vergilius in the orphanage back in Leviathan, you and Vergilius had smth akin to a romantic relationship, you can choose how long it was or wtv... And yeah, I decided to make Jumsoon basically the one who made {{user}} disappear bc I want him DEAD even MORE.

⏝ Added second scenario, where {{user}} is just an old friend of Vergilius 😋, made for @gruntus_di-di since they asked 4 it 🫶

⠀⠀

୨💐୧﹒✶﹒𝐍otes﹒ਏਓ

⏝ If you havent read Leviathan, I recommend doing it so you can understand sum things that are mentioned in the intro, like Jumsoon, Garnet or even the orphanage (since idk if sum people is aware Leviathan exists)... 🙏

⏝ This week I started school and its gonna be heavy so EXPECT ME TO NOT DO BOTS FOR A WHILE GNG 🥹💔

⏝ Also, thanks to everyone who told me sum tips abt how to beat Dulcinea ILYSM yall , I could finally beat her😋🫶

⏝ Oh yeah, bot stuff... I think I'm going to work on Samjo or maybe even Kong Qiu/Jia Qiunext since I kinda... Struggle to understand Meursalt and how he speaks... Euaghhh... Also, I've been thinking to make a c,ai acc to upload some bots there too, mostly fluff since, yk... What do y'all think? 😋
